## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (frontend and backend)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are included
- [ ] API or data model changes are documented
- [ ] i18n text includes zh-CN and en-US where applicable
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
- [ ] Risks and rollback plan are noted
